title: MEG-BIDS OMEGA RestingState_sample
description: The OMEGA Resting State Sample Dataset comprises magnetoencephalography (MEG) recordings from 5 subjects during 5-minute eyes-open resting state sessions, acquired using a CTF 275 system at the Montreal Neurological Institute. The dataset includes high-resolution MEG data with reference sensors and axial gradiometers, concurrent physiological recordings (ECG and EOG), 3D head digitization, and structural T1-weighted MRI images processed with FreeSurfer 5.3. Data are organized according to the MEG-BIDS specification and serve as a reference resource for MEG methodology and resting-state neuroimaging research.
methods_description: MEG data were recorded at the Montreal Neurological Institute (2012-2016) using a CTF 275 MEG system at 2400 Hz sampling rate with anti-aliasing low-pass filter at 600 Hz. Recordings included 26 MEG reference sensors, 270 MEG axial gradiometers, and bipolar ECG and EOG channels. Head shape and fiducial points were obtained via 3D digitization using a Polhemus Fastrak device. Structural T1 images were acquired and processed with FreeSurfer 5.3.
